title: Synthetic AI Employee Brief
summary: Public-safe synthetic brief for the minimal AI employee profile fixture.

title: Support Department
summary: Synthetic department that owns the AI support employee.

title: Support Assistant
summary: Synthetic AI employee that helps triage support requests through governed actions.

title: Support Triage Role
summary: Role responsible for classifying requests, preparing answers and escalating risky cases.

title: Ticket Classification
summary: Skill for classifying support requests by topic, urgency and required owner.

title: Support Policy Knowledge
summary: Knowledge object that references the public-safe support policy used by the AI employee.

title: Recent Ticket Patterns
summary: Memory object for reviewed patterns from recent support work.

title: Ticket API
summary: Tool adapter used by runtime to read and update support tickets.

title: Update Ticket Status
summary: Capability required before the runtime may update a ticket status through the Ticket API.

title: Approval Before External Action
summary: Policy requiring approval before the AI employee performs external or user-visible actions.

title: External Action Approval Gate
summary: Governance gate that separates proposed actions from executed actions.

title: Ticket Triage Workflow
summary: Workflow for classifying a support ticket, preparing a proposed action and recording the result.

title: Propose Status Update
summary: Proposed runtime action to update a support ticket status after policy and approval checks.

title: Status Update Audited Result
summary: Audited result recording whether the approved status update matched the expected outcome.

title: Status Update Review Feedback
summary: Feedback from reviewing the audited result of the ticket status update.

title: Require Clear Status Reason
summary: Proposed lesson that future ticket status updates should include a clear user-visible reason.

title: AI Service Federation Endpoint
summary: Placeholder endpoint showing how this AI employee could federate with another AI service.
